recommendations.overview: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures as they battle each other for supremacy of the sea.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Alone in the Dark 2
recommendations.overview: When the night falls, and the creatures of the dark are crawling out of the shadows, there is only one man who stands between us and evil: Edward Carnby.

recommendations.title: The Thaw

recommendations.title: Zoombies
recommendations.overview: When a strange virus quickly spreads through a safari park and turns all the zoo animals undead, those left in the park must stop the creatures before they escape and zombify the whole city.

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.
